label: Neko (Gif the cat)
summary: A pixel cat that chases your cursor, patrols an element edge, or dozes.
era: The desktop-cat lineage (Neko/oneko), on the web since the late 90s. Gif is our own, drawn from a blank grid.

classes.name: rs-neko
classes.role: the cat sprite the widget creates

options.name: target
options.note: the element to patrol the top edge of

options.name: src
options.note: override the sprite sheet URL (defaults to the skin's)

a11y: Decoration: aria-hidden, pointer-events:none. Under prefers-reduced-motion the cat stays, sitting still. Chase falls back to patrol on touch. Two cats per page, maximum.
